what_it_does: This file is a ledger metadata record for a single image asset in the design-source channel; it stores YAML front matter identifying the image's id, address, channel, path, blob reference, MIME type, name, dimensions, source category, author session, creation time, and links, followed by a one-line body label.
observations: The asset is a JPEG image named p-02 in the deck1-2026 path under the design-source channel.
It references blob b2:e7bec61171eb928cd215ac569ed52e7a via a blob:// URI.
Width and height are both recorded as 0.
The source field is design_source_material and the author_session is ch-3mpkjg3r.
The body text reads: SOURCE design ground-truth — deck1-2026/p-02.jpg.
standouts: Width and height are 0 for an image record.
It is explicitly labeled as SOURCE design ground-truth.
It uses a content-addressed blob reference rather than a file-system path.
conventions: Uses YAML front matter with a fixed set of ledger fields.
Uses an image:// channel-scoped address and a blob:// content reference.
Body uses a terse SOURCE label convention.
Zero dimensions may be a placeholder convention for unprocessed image assets.
concerns: Recorded width and height are 0, suggesting missing image metadata or unprocessed ingestion.
No visual description, alt text, or content summary is provided.
No links or relationships are captured, leaving the asset isolated in context.
notes: A thin, content-addressed ledger stub for a design deck image that is tagged as ground-truth source material but currently lacks dimensions and descriptive context.
questions: What visual content does deck1-2026/p-02.jpg actually contain?

purpose_vs_actual: The file is presented as a SOURCE design ground-truth record, and it does serve as a source-material ledger entry; however, it functions as a minimal metadata stub with no embedded visual data, dimensions, or descriptive content.
apparent_themes: Provenance tracking of design source material.
Minimal metadata stubs for later enrichment.
intention_signals: The file appears to be trying to register a specific page or frame from a design deck as a canonical, retrievable source asset within a channel memory system.
novelty: It explicitly marks the image as design ground-truth and uses a blob://b2 content-addressed identifier, while leaving dimensions at zero.
contribution: It contributes a stable, channel-scoped identity and content-addressed pointer for one design-deck image, which a fused system can use as a reference anchor even before visual metadata or relationships are added.
summary_for_embedding: This file is a YAML-fronted ledger entry for a JPEG image named p-02 in the design-source/deck1-2026 channel, referencing blob b2:e7bec61171eb928cd215ac569ed52e7a, with zero width/height, no links, and a one-line ground-truth source label.
intention_for_embedding: It was meant to record a canonical source image from a 2026 design deck for provenance tracking and later retrieval.
